subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou didst write to Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Taqí was noted. Its contents were imbued [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید مضمون مشحون
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
